Structured-Data Test Variants

Each variant tests a different combination of DataLayer, JSON-LD, and OpenGraph signals.

IDLabelDataLayerJSON-LDOpenGraphPages
c1 Full Canonical ga4 full full home · product · category
c2 DataLayer Only ga4 — — home · product · category
c3 JSON-LD Only suppress full — home · product · category
c4 OpenGraph Only suppress — full home · product · category
c5 DataLayer + JSON-LD ga4 full — home · product · category
c6 DataLayer + OpenGraph ga4 — full home · product · category
c7 JSON-LD + OG Complementary suppress no-price price-only home · product · category
c8 Non-Standard DataLayer nonstandard — — home · product · category
c9 Sparse / Partial Everywhere partial minimal minimal home · product · category
c10 CEDDL + JSON-LD + OG ceddl full full home · product · category

Run cd tests && npm test to generate the gap report. Run cd tests && npm run automap to generate JQ mappings.
